hooks.command: powershell -Command "$date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $path = '.claude/HANDOFF.md'; $content = \"`n=== AUTO-CHECKPOINT: Pre-compaction $date ===`nContext approaching limit — state saved before compaction.`nResume: Load CLAUDE.md and this HANDOFF.md.`n==========================`n\"; Add-Content -Path $path -Value $content; Write-Host 'Checkpoint saved to .claude/HANDOFF.md'"
